title: Cobblemon and Stellaris Compatability Datapack
description: A Cobblemon datapack that allows space themed pokemon(alongside some legendaries we all love) to spawn in Stellaris planets without suffocating.
body:
**_As the summary says this datapack allows pokemon from the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)_ mod to spawn in [Stellaris](https://modrinth.com/mod/stellaris) planets.(Well some, this datapack is still in development)**

![A picture of some pokemon on the moon with a deoxys coincidentally spawning there.(I was play testing for too long)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c00af5d9585fb26de67688a9bd188ac3b2cec27d_0.webp)

I shall now provide you with a list of available pokemons at the moment since im such a _TOTALLY_ great developer!(This is like my first time making a datapack LOL)


Arceus(All Planets)\
Blacephalon(All Planets)\
Buzzwole(All Planets)\
Cleffa/Clefairy/Clefable(The Moon)\
Cosmog(All Planets)\
Charcadet(Mercury and Venus)\
Deoxys(All Planets)\
Elgyem/Beheeyem(All Planets)\
Groudon(Mercury and Venus)\
Guzzlord(All Planets)\
Kartana(All Planets)\
Lunatone(The Moon)\
Minior(The Moon)\
Magikarp-Saucy Violet jump form(Fishing in Mars Ice spikes, lure not required)\
Necrozma(All Planets)\
Nihilego(All Planets and fishing in Mars Ice Spikes, lure not required)\
Onyx(The Moon)
Rayquaza(The Moon)\
Poipole(All Planets)\
Solrock(Mercury and Venus)\
Staryuu/Starmie(Ice Spikes in Mars)\
Stakataka(All Planets)\
Kyurem(Ice Spikes in Mars)\
Kyogre(Fishing in Ice Spikes in Mars, Check Obtainment method spoiler)\
Reshiram(Ice Spikes in Mars)\
Xurkitree(All Planets)\
Zekrom(Ice Spikes in Mars)\
Shiny Zygarde 10% Power Construct(The Moon)\
Just to quickly adress any concerns about this Zygarde, I thought it would be funny to add in since it's main colour matches the moon, it is rarer than Arceus though if you dont want this just toss it out of the datapack.

Feel free to join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/YaBXKFdSts) if you'd like to suggest anything, ask a question or report a bug.
Or just add me on discord(nr8d)


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

I would like to credit Zyxey for coming up with this concept, I honestly would've just used their datapack but the lack of legendaries/mythicals/ultra beasts dissapointed me so I decided to take it one step further.(They also added extra spawns that weren't in stellaris for some reason?? Like I noticed some pokemon were spawning in the aether when they shouldn't LOL, took me like 30m of digging through my datapacks to find out why)


</details>


<details>
<summary>Special or just weird obtainment methods</summary>
This kyogre is probably one of the hardest and time wasting pokemon to try and get in here
Kyogre: Make a closed building in the ice spikes biome, make sure to have a full oxygen distributor, a pokerod with lure 3(Lure 3 is required to catch Kyogre) and an infinite source of water(2 buckets), a building is required if you dont make one your water will just freeze over time. With the infinite source of water make a small pond and make sure your surroundings is closed off by said building so the water doesn't freeze. Now all you have to do is fish and wait, good luck.

</details>




**If you'd like some rescource packs to see the legendaries/mythicals(if they show up as a doll for you) I suggest using [AllTheMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons) or if you're on mega showdown then use [AllTheMons x Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy)**\
This is also compatible with [RCT/Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod) I would've tried figuring out how to make them spawn with space suits but I'm too bothered as it's 6am while I am making this so for now they can freely roam space without spacesuits, maybe they're alien beings haha.
This also doesn't mess up any datapacks that spawn pokemon so dont worry about that.
